name: hud_ui_background_bind_primitive_node_to_element
description: HudUiBackground::BindPrimitiveNodeToElement resolves a named primitive from cfgRoot->PRIMITIVES, adds the element as a child, applies optional bitmap/position/wordwrap/font/color/endpoints, binds the background blit source and current rect, sets dirty/visibility flags, and returns 0.
known_limits: This binder intentionally accepts mixed target layouts: widget fields for BITMAP, panel fields for FONT/WORDWRAP, and primitive endpoint fields for COLOR/ENDP_*; class-level binary-safe review should keep those concrete call sites together.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?BindPrimitiveNodeToElement@HudUiBackground@@QAEHPAUNode@zReader@@PAUHudUiElement@@PBD@Z at 0x4ba0e0 still fails: 705 unmasked mismatches, 136 relocation bytes masked, 15 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 620 bytes and the VC object symbol is 880 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows cfgRoot lookup, PRIMITIVES/name lookup, AddChild, optional BITMAP load, origin-relative POSITION, WORDWRAP rect, FONT style application, COLOR packed through zVid_PackColorRGB, ENDP_REL/ENDP_ABS endpoint setup, final SetBltSourceAndClipRect, flag update, and return 0.

The native background primitive smoke builds a minimal ZRD PRIMITIVES tree and validates child insertion, origin-relative position, packed color, relative endpoint calculation, final blt source/clip rect, and dirty flag update.
